decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_nyc-dot matches the canonical registry record entity_nyc-dot (NYC Department of Transportation). Both represent the same agency entity with matching entity_name and entity_type. No different registry record is a closer match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The logo for the New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT), featuring the text 'NEW YORK CITY' above 'DOT' and a stylized bridge icon.

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_mta-nyct matches the canonical registry record entity_mta-nyct (MTA New York City Transit). Both represent the same transit agency with matching entity_name. No different registry record is a closer match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The logo for the Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA) New York City Transit, featuring the MTA globe icon and the text "MTA New York City Transit".

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_brooklyn-cb3-2011 matches the canonical registry record entity_brooklyn-cb3-2011 (Community Board 3, Brooklyn). Both represent Brooklyn Community Board 3 as the audience for Nostrand/Rogers SBS presentation. No different registry record is a closer match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave Select Bus Service Community Board 3

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_hylan-cac matches the canonical registry record entity_hylan-cac (Community Advisory Committee for Nostrand/Rogers SBS). Both represent the same committee composed of community stakeholders for the Nostrand/Rogers SBS project. No different registry record is a closer match.
